question: What is the main theme of the song?
answer_ja: 愛と約束

question: What does the singer mean by 'I fell right through the cracks'?
answer_ja: 彼は迷子になったか見落とされた

question: What does 'divine intervention' imply in the song?
options: A miracle or help from a higher power
answer_en: A miracle or help from a higher power
answer_zh: 奇蹟或來自更高力量的幫助
answer_ja: 奇跡や高次の力からの助け

question: What does the singer encourage the listener to do in the line 'Open up your mind and see like me'?
answer_ja: もっと心を開くこと

question: What does the phrase 'this is our fate' suggest?
answer_zh: 他們的命運或不可避免的未來
answer_ja: 彼らの運命または避けられない未来

question: What does the singer mean by 'I won't hesitate no more'?
answer_ja: 彼はためらわずに行動する

question: What does 'our time is short' imply in the song?
options: Life is limited and should be cherished
They have a lot of time
answer_en: Life is limited and should be cherished
answer_ja: 人生は限られており、大切にすべき

question: What does the singer mean by 'I look into your heart and you'll find love'?
options: True love is found by understanding someone deeply
answer_en: True love is found by understanding someone deeply
answer_zh: 透過深入了解找到真愛
answer_ja: 誰かを深く理解することで真実の愛が見つかる

question: What does the repeated phrase 'I'm yours' express?
answer_ja: 約束と献身

question: What does the singer mean by 'just go with the seasons'?
answer_zh: 自然地適應並接受變化
answer_ja: 自然に変化に適応し受け入れる

question: What did the singer try to do to 'beat you'?
options: He tried to resist or overcome feelings
He tried to win a game
answer_en: He tried to resist or overcome feelings
answer_zh: 他試圖抗拒或克服感情
answer_ja: 彼は感情に抵抗し克服しようとした

question: What happened when the singer's breath fogged up the glass?
options: He drew a new face and laughed
answer_en: He drew a new face and laughed
answer_zh: 他畫了一張新臉並笑了
answer_ja: 彼は新しい顔を描いて笑った

question: What does the singer say about 'vanities'?
options: There is no better reason to rid yourself of them
answer_en: There is no better reason to rid yourself of them
answer_zh: 沒有比這更好的理由擺脫虛榮
answer_ja: 虚栄心を捨てるより良い理由はない

question: What does the singer say about 'our name'?
answer_ja: それは私たちの美徳です

question: What does the singer promise to do before the 'cool done run out'?
answer_ja: 戻ろうとする

question: What does the singer say about 'people dance and sing'?
options: They are just one big family
answer_en: They are just one big family
answer_ja: 彼らは大きな家族のようだ

question: What does the singer say about 'our god forsaken right'?
options: It is the right to be lonely
It is the right to be happy
It is the right to be free
It is the right to be angry
answer_en: It is the right to be lonely
answer_ja: それは孤独である権利だ

question: What does the singer say about 'checking my tongue in the mirror'?
options: He spent too long doing it
answer_en: He spent too long doing it
answer_zh: 他花了太長時間檢查舌頭
answer_ja: 彼は舌を鏡で長く見ていた

question: What does the singer say about 'bending over backwards'?
options: He did it to try to see clearer
answer_en: He did it to try to see clearer
answer_zh: 他彎腰是為了看得更清楚
answer_ja: 彼はもっとはっきり見ようとした

question: What does the singer say about 'nibble your ears'?
answer_zh: 他會親昵地輕咬你的耳朵
answer_ja: 彼は優しく耳をかじる

question: What does 'melted' mean in the context 'so hot that I melted'?
options: To become soft or weak emotionally
answer_en: To become soft or weak emotionally
answer_zh: 情感上變得柔軟或脆弱
answer_ja: 感情的に柔らかくなる

question: What does 'divine intervention' mean?
options: Help from a god or supernatural force
answer_en: Help from a god or supernatural force
answer_zh: 來自神或超自然力量的幫助
answer_ja: 神や超自然的な力からの助け

question: What does 'hesitate' mean?
answer_ja: 何かをする前にためらう

question: What does 'complicate' mean?
answer_ja: 物事をより難しくする

question: What does 'nibble' mean?
answer_ja: 優しくかじる

question: What does 'vanities' refer to?
options: Excessive pride in appearance or achievements
answer_en: Excessive pride in appearance or achievements
answer_zh: 對外表或成就的過度自負
answer_ja: 外見や業績に対する過剰な誇り

question: What does 'fogged up the glass' mean?
options: Caused the glass to become cloudy with moisture
answer_en: Caused the glass to become cloudy with moisture
answer_zh: 使玻璃因水氣變得模糊
answer_ja: ガラスが湿気で曇る

question: What does 'reckon' mean in the phrase 'I reckon it took in my turn'?
answer_ja: 考えるまたは信じる

question: What does 'beat' mean in 'I tried to beat you'?
answer_ja: 克服または勝つ

question: What does 'open up your mind' mean?
answer_ja: 新しい考えを受け入れる

question: How would you describe the mood of this song?
answer_ja: 楽しくてロマンチック

question: What advice does the song give about love?
answer_ja: 開放的で献身的であること

question: How can 'going with the seasons' be applied in daily life?
answer_ja: 変化を受け入れ適応する

question: Why is it important to 'open up your mind' in relationships?
answer_ja: より良く理解し繋がるため

question: What does 'I won't hesitate no more' tell us about decision making?
answer_ja: 自信を持って迅速に行動する

question: How does the song suggest dealing with 'vanities'?
options: Let go of them to live freely
answer_en: Let go of them to live freely
answer_ja: 虚栄心を手放して自由に生きる

question: What does 'our time is short' remind us about life?
answer_ja: すべての瞬間を大切にする

question: How can 'looking into someone's heart' be interpreted?
answer_ja: 彼らの本当の気持ちを理解する

question: Why might the singer say 'please don't complicate'?
answer_ja: 愛をシンプルに保つため

question: What does 'I'm yours' symbolize in a relationship?
answer_ja: 献身と帰属意識
